Oasa period was Karmic. Ketu is placed on the asterism of Venus
and it became all the more important because Venus is one of the
Karmic Conuolling Planets. With the beginning of Ketu oasa, he started
from the sctap and reached on the dizzy heights of his life. Such time
wil not repeat as he will not see Rahu Dasa. He was on Top of his trade
and industty in the country, but before the end of Ketu oasa. he came
to his normal pattern of Destiny i.e. there were times when he had
nothing to eat and nothing to wear. He had to suffer the greatest
humiliation of his life. But perhaps God has a purpose behind it. He
become religious and spiritualistic from selfish and materialistic approach.
Venus Oasa. planet of Karmic Distribution Control. brought about
complete revolution and rejuvenation in his life and he hc:tS attained a
position which he could have never drei'm of in his ear1y life. Had Venus
